sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports fatigue for the past two months. The patient denies blood in stool. The patient reports experiencing nasal congestion due to allergies.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The clinician hears a slight three out of six systolic ejection murmur. The echocardiogram shows a slightly low pumping function of the heart at 45%. The echocardiogram shows mitral regurgitation. The ECG shows stable findings reflecting prior coronary artery disease.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The clinician suspects cervical radiculopathy. The patient reports chest pain when walking, described as a burning sensation, occurring approximately three times per week.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The clinician plans a cervical MRI. The clinician plans to continue the patient on aspirin. The clinician plans to start the patient on toprol. The clinician orders a lipid panel. The clinician orders a cardiac stress test.
